description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large glass touchscreen on the front. The back panel is a solid, muted color with a glossy finish and a dual-lens camera module positioned vertically in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible physical buttons for volume and power control. The front display is expansive, with a narrow bezel and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The device appears lightweight and compact, typical of contemporary mobile phones. Its overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and slim metallic sides with physical buttons. The back is glossy and minimalist, while the front features a wide display with a top notch.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a glossy back panel with a dual-lens camera and flash in the top left corner.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim metallic edge and two elongated physical buttons.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large glass touchscreen, narrow bezels, and a top notch for sensors.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a slim metallic edge with a single elongated button.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays faint vertical colored lines, suggesting it is either malfunctioning or turned on with a display error; no icons, wallpaper, or interface elements are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera module located vertically in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash.
attribute_button_layout: Two elongated buttons on the left edge (likely volume controls) and one elongated button on the right edge (likely the power button).
